name: bsg-ide

metadata.name: bsg-ide
classifiers: License :: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication

documentation:
# Beamer Slide Generator IDE

A customizable IDE for creating Beamer presentations with multimedia support.

## Installation

You can install BSG-IDE directly from PyPI:

```bash
pip install bsg-ide
```

Or install from source:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/sajeethphilip/Beamer-Slide-Generator.git
cd Beamer-Slide-Generator
pip install -e .
```

## Prerequisites

- Python 3.7 or higher
- LaTeX distribution (TeXLive/MikTeX)
- For video presentations: pympress

## Usage

After installation, you can launch BSG-IDE in two ways:

1. From command line:
```bash
bsg-ide
```

2. Import and run programmatically:
```python
from bsg_ide import BeamerSlideEditor
editor = BeamerSlideEditor()
editor.mainloop()
```

## Features

- WYSIWYG Beamer slide editing
- Multimedia support (images, videos, URLs)
- Syntax highlighting
- Live preview
- Presenter notes support
- Export to PDF/Overleaf

## License

This project is licensed under Creative Commons - see the LICENSE file for details.

## Author

Ninan Sajeeth Philip (nsp@airis4d.com)

modules.name: bsg_ide.BeamerSlideGenerator_v2
documentation:
BeamerSlideGenerator.py
A tool for generating Beamer presentation slides with multimedia content.
Supports local files, URL downloads, and content-only slides.
!/usr/bin/env python3

functions.name: bsg_ide.BeamerSlideGenerator_v2.set_terminal_io
documentation: Set the terminal I/O object and verify it's working

functions.name: bsg_ide.BeamerSlideGenerator_v2.verify_required_packages
documentation:
Verify required packages are present in preamble.
Returns list of missing packages.

functions.name: bsg_ide.BeamerSlideGenerator_v2.generate_preview_frame
documentation:
Generates a preview frame for different media types.
Returns the path to the preview image.

functions.name: bsg_ide.BeamerSlideGenerator_v2.get_beamer_preamble
documentation: Returns Beamer preamble with proper package dependency handling and contained frame titles

functions.name: bsg_ide.BeamerSlideGenerator_v2.get_footline_template
documentation: Returns the correct footline template for Beamer.

functions.name: bsg_ide.BeamerSlideGenerator_v2.format_url_footnote
documentation:
Format URL footnotes with proper hyperlinks.
Now used for footnotes instead of tikzpicture sources.

documentation: Interactively creates a new input file with slide content and proper preamble.

documentation:
Detects if the input file has a complete preamble by checking for key commands.
Now also checks for short institution name.

documentation: Sanitizes a filename for safe use in file systems.

functions.name: bsg_ide.BeamerSlideGenerator_v2.validate_url
documentation:
Validates a URL and provides specific error messages.
Now handles file and None directives.

documentation: Constructs a Google search query from title and content.

documentation: Opens Google Image search in default browser.

documentation: Special handling for Giphy URLs to get the actual GIF.

functions.name: bsg_ide.BeamerSlideGenerator_v2.download_media
documentation: Enhanced version with source tracking.

functions.name: bsg_ide.BeamerSlideGenerator_v2.process_latex_content
documentation:
Process content line to properly handle LaTeX math expressions,
ensuring underscores work correctly as subscripts in math mode.
Also handles other LaTeX commands and special characters.

documentation: Generate formatted content items with optional color

functions.name: bsg_ide.BeamerSlideGenerator_v2.format_source_citation
documentation:
Format source URLs for citation with proper LaTeX formatting and hyperlinks.
Abbreviates long URLs and ensures proper clickable links.

documentation: Process content items with proper None handling

documentation: Process media with graceful handling of missing files and URLs

documentation:
Original implementation using standard I/O for fallback.
Returns tuple of (latex_code, directives) where directives can be a single string or tuple of (tex_directive, text_directive)

Downloads YouTube video and returns file information.
